violations.description: Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee states the restroom is used for handwashing.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
